provides: Listings and catalog vertical: a Listing core (owner, opaque category, typed attribute values, price + price_base, inventory) with a draft/publish lifecycle, an independent moderation status, a value-validation pipeline delegated to stapel-attributes against a category schema fetched over comm, a publish service, and first-class favorites.

gates.behavior: When on, publish approves and activates a listing immediately instead of waiting for a moderation.completed event (conf.py; MODULE.md 'What this module deliberately does NOT do').

curated.summary: Escape hatch for deployments with no stapel-moderation module installed: publish skips the moderation wait and goes live immediately.
curated.business_label: Auto-approve listings on publish (no moderation module)

gates.behavior: Publish/validate-draft reject a listing with zero image references when on (conf.py).

curated.summary: Require at least one image reference before a listing can be published.
curated.business_label: Require a photo to publish a listing

extension_points.name: PRICE_BASE_CONVERTER
extension_points.summary: Single-strategy REPLACE seam: callable (amount, currency, base) -> Decimal computing price_base. Default is identity; a host with stapel-currencies wires it to a real conversion backend (conf.py, MODULE.md Extension points).

extension_points.name: CATEGORY_FEATURES_FUNCTION
extension_points.summary: Name of the comm Function resolving a category's feature schema (default 'categories.features', provided by stapel-categories) — REPLACE, single provider (conf.py, MODULE.md).

extension_points.name: AUTH_USER_MODEL
extension_points.summary: Standard Django user swap — Listing.owner and Favorite bind to settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL (models.py:197, models.py:480).

extension_points.name: serializer_seams
extension_points.summary: ListingViewSet resolves detail_serializer_class / card_serializer_class / draft_serializer_class per action from overridable class attributes; subclass and remount the router to swap any of them (views.py:63-82, MODULE.md Serializer seams).

requires.reason: comm bus (mutate_and_emit/emit/function/call), GDPR provider registry, AUTH_USER_MODEL base (pyproject.toml dependency; apps.py:18, models.py:31, functions.py:20, events.py)
delegates every attribute value check and DTO->DAO conversion to stapel-attributes' engine (pyproject.toml dependency; serializers.py:13, views.py:18)
comm-only dependency: the categories.features Function provides the category feature schema for value validation; no direct Python import (MODULE.md boundaries: 'this module never imports it')
